name: Basic Muffins and Variations
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Combine egg, milk, and oil. Add the egg mixture all at once to the flour mixture.
4. Stir just until moistened; batter should be lumpy.
5. Grease muffin cups or line with paper baking cups; fill 2/3 full.
6. Bake in a 400°F oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden.
7. Remove from pans and serve warm. Makes 10 to 12 muffins.
Variations:
- Add: Blueberry: Combine 3/4 cup fresh or frozen blueberries (thawed), and 2 tablespoons additional sugar. Apple-Raisin: Stir in 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon into the flour mixture. Fold 1 cup chopped, peeled apple and 1/4 cup raisins into the batter. Jelly: Spoon 1 teaspoon jelly on top of batter in each muffin cup before baking.
- Date-Nut: Fold 2/3 cup coarsely chopped pitted dates and 1/3 cup walnuts or pecans into the batter.
- Cheese: Stir 1/2 cup shredded cheddar or swiss cheese into the flour mixture.
- Banana-Nut: Decrease milk to 1/2 cup. Stir 1 cup mashed banana and 1/2 cup chopped nuts into the batter.
- Pumpkin: Increase sugar to 1/3 cup. Add 1/2 cup canned pumpkin to the egg mixture. Stir 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon and 1/2 teaspoon ground nutmeg into the flour mixture. Stir in 1/2 cup raisins into the batter.
- Cranberry: Coarsely chop 1 cup fresh or frozen cranberries and combine with 1/4 cup additional sugar. Fold into the batter.
